/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, DEFENSE SUBPOENAED RECORDS RELEASE TO DEFENSE COUNSEL/WITEXCL: DEFENSE COUNSEL/ /INVOFF: SERGEANT CASPER/WIT SWORN DA: OFFICER TOMMIE BARTLEY/WIT SWORN DA: OFFICER PATRICK MCCNICOL/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1: 8,5 X 11 SHEET DEPICTING A DIRECTIONAL DIAGRAM/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 2: 8,5 X 11 PHOTOGRAPH DEPICTING THEWATER TREATMENT FACILITY/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 3: 8,5 X 11 PHOTOGRAPH DEPICTING A FENCE AND GUN/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 4: 8,5 X 11 PHOTOGRAPH DEPICTING A CLOSE-UP OF THEGUN/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 5: CERTIFY 969(B) PACKET/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 6: 8,5 X 11 SHEET DEPICTING A GOOGLE MAP/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 7: 8,5 X 11 PHOTOGRAPH DEPICTING AN INDIVIDUAL WEARING BLACK/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 8: SUBPOENAED MEDICAL RECORDS/X: COUNSEL STIPULATE AS TO THE DRUGS FOR THE PURPOSE OF THE PRELIMINARY HEARING,/ARG&SUB/X :THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THE OFFENSE OF PENAL CODE SECTION 245(A)(2), A LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE WITHIN COUNT 1, PENAL CODE SECTION 664,187(A), SHOWNBY THE EVIDENCE, HAVE BEEN COMMITTED; THAT THERE IS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO BELIEVE THE ABOVE NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, IT IS ORDERED THAT SAID DEFENDANT BE HELD TO ANSWER TO THE SAME,/HTA1:3, 4, 5, AND 6/871D:2/CTORD:COUNT 7 CERTIFY/X: THE MAGISTRATE STRIKES THE ALLEGATION, WITHIN COUNT 3, OF GREAT BODILY INJURY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 12022,7(A) AND DISCHARGESDEFENDANT AS TO THAT ALLEGATION,/X: THE MAGISTRATE STRIKES THE ALLEGATION, WITHIN COUNT 3, OF PERSONAL AND INTENTIONAL DISCHARGE OF A FIREARM PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 12022,53(D) AND DISCHARGES DEFENDANT AS TO THAT ALLEGATION,/BAIL:750,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/X: THE EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO THE PEOPLE,/
